scoring: batched instrument env (validated vs Rust within 0.04% on both policies); holdout CRN seed 900000, 2048 paths, proportional rationing, averaged over 8 emergency-RNG seeds
note_ppo_train_vs_scored: train-time best-checkpoint (49708, single emerg seed, 1024 paths) carried mild selection optimism; honest unbiased score over 8 emerg seeds x 2048 paths = 50475, statistically indistinguishable from the gate 50484
verdict: Under our protocol, our compact CMA-ES soft-tree BEATS a faithfully-retrained, BC-warm-started PPO: 43801+/-247 vs 50475+/-391 (X-A=+6674, ~13.2%, beyond 2x combined SEM 207). Faithful in-protocol PPO converges back to the gate heuristic and cannot reach the soft-tree level.
